hero.imageAlt: Decorated fabric banners hanging from birch trees with set table behind
hero.title: Rituals
hero.subtitle: Some moments in life ask for a place.

children.text: There are moments — birthdays, milestones, farewells, beginnings — that benefit from being held somewhere apart from ordinary life. Sømliøya has been the setting for many of them.
The island does not cater or perform. It simply offers a stage: water, sky, fire, and time.

midImage.alt: Community gathering at table under decorated fabric banners

children.text: People come to Sømliøya to mark things. To gather those they love. To make promises, or to say goodbye. To celebrate quietly, away from the noise of ordinary venues.

shapedTogetherSection.heading: Shaped Together

children.text: We have hosted weddings, anniversaries, and family gatherings on the island. We have also hosted creative retreats for artists, writers, and musicians who needed uninterrupted time and space.
In all cases, the event is shaped by the people who come — not by a programme. The island provides the container; you bring what needs to happen.

shapedTogetherSection.imageAlt: Artist painting at an easel among birch trees

gatheringsSection.heading: Other Gatherings

children.text: Corporate retreats, team offsites, and professional workshops have also found a home here. Away from offices and cities, people tend to think differently — and more honestly.

gatheringsSection.pullQuote: The island has a way of making things clearer.
